User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account details including subscription tier and premium status.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Authentication.

email.description: Primary email address of the user.

isPremium.description: Whether the user has premium features unlocked.

Download.title: Download Record
Download.description: A record of a successful video or audio download by the user.

id.description: Unique ID of the download record.

userId.description: UID of the owner of this download record.

url.description: Original YouTube or Instagram video link.

downloadUrl.description: Temporary stream/download URL returned by the service.

platform.description: The social media platform of the video.

downloadedAt.description: Server timestamp of the download action.

/users/{userId}.description: Access control and settings for a specific user profile.

/users/{userId}/downloads/{downloadId}.description: Download history logs created by the user.
